name: Impact
description: Hyperion repeater pistols tighten up the longer you keep firing, with accuracy improving over a sustained burst. The accuracy shown on the card reflects the weapon once this effect has fully ramped up. Impact models use a Torgue barrel, boosting damage but worsening handling. Expect lower base accuracy, heavier recoil, and slower reload and fire rate.
notes: In Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel, Impact variants often appear with Hyperion's newer material set and prefix style, matching Borderlands 2. A related variant, the Devigorator, is also found in The Pre-Sequel and is produced by the older Hyperion line.
